name: Absorb Shield
description: Vladof absorb shields can sometimes catch incoming bullets or rockets before they hit you. When that effect triggers, the damage is canceled and you gain ammo of the same type, which makes these shields especially useful against gun-heavy enemies and in long fights where ammunition matters.
notes: Absorption only works against certain projectile attacks, not every kind of incoming damage. It is strongest in exposed firefights with limited cover and against enemies that rely on conventional guns.

special.description: Has a chance to absorb incoming projectiles, prevent their damage, and add matching ammo to your reserves.
